payload.answer: The records do not contain a single, explicit consolidated conclusion about Brain and Cognee. You have maintained separate, potentially evolving statements: (1) Brain as a memory system with a source-of-truth conclusion in the Brain DB, (2) a Cognee rebuildable projection, (3) a Slack strict intake with family facts and Sam preferences. There is no deduced, current unified statement tying Brain and Cognee together as a single conclusion; any conclusion must be articulated by synthesizing these components without superseding prior, possibly ambiguous entries.
